summary: Comprehensive testing of Cake Shop app - Product Detail Page upgrade with quantity selector and dual buttons (Add to Cart / Order Now). All 22 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI tests passed for quantity selector, weight selection, price calculation, Add to Cart, Order Now flows, and cart page differentiation.
seed_data_creation: Backend seeds 8 sample cakes and admin user on startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working. Backend uses cookie-based JWT auth (httponly). Cart API requires authentication. Direct order flow passes is_direct_order=true to prevent cart clearing. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_cake_shop.py covers auth, cakes, cart, orders, and admin endpoints.

product_detail_page.quantity_selector: PASSED - +/- buttons work, min value 1, default 1
product_detail_page.weight_selection: PASSED - 500g/1kg/1.5kg/2kg options with correct price multipliers
product_detail_page.price_calculation: PASSED - Price updates based on weight AND quantity
product_detail_page.add_to_cart_button: PASSED - Visible, outline style, requires login + delivery date
product_detail_page.order_now_button: PASSED - Visible, primary style, requires login + delivery date

cart_page.normal_cart_flow: PASSED - Shows 'Shopping Cart' heading, no direct order banner
cart_page.direct_order_flow: PASSED - Shows 'Quick Checkout' heading, direct order banner visible
cart_page.place_order: PASSED - COD payment, navigates to orders page on success

backend_api.direct_order: PASSED - POST /api/orders with is_direct_order=true does NOT clear cart
backend_api.cart_order: PASSED - POST /api/orders with is_direct_order=false clears cart
